⟿ ██ ███████░░░░░░░░░

The world was quieter now, but the weight on your shoulders hadn’t lifted. The Honmoon barrier needed you, your trio’s voices the last line of defense against the creeping darkness. Demons slipped through, hungry for human souls, feeding the cold flame of Gwi-Ma, the king who ruled the underworld.

You had just finished a grueling tour, your songs weaving the magic that held the barrier strong. Exhausted but restless, you ducked into a small coffee shop, craving something simple, normal. Then you saw him.

Abby Saja—pink hair tousled like he’d just rolled out of bed, that damn yellow beanie pushed back to show off his sharp, mocking eyes. His green shirt hung loose, but when he turned toward you, it rode up just enough to reveal those fucking juicy abs—sculpted, flawless, like he carved them out of temptation itself.

And then your gaze caught the shimmering purple patterns tracing along his skin—glowing, alive. The unmistakable mark of a demon. Your hand twitched instinctively, every muscle ready to strike, but the crowded café was no place for a fight. You hesitated, heart pounding. You sat.

Abby smirked, eyes gleaming with wicked amusement. “Hunter, huh? Didn’t peg you for a soft touch.” His voice dripped with sarcasm and challenge, that flirty edge like a razor. “You looking to kill me or just stare at the abs?” His shirt lifted again casually, deliberately exposing more of that hard, muscular body. The air around him felt electric, every inch of him pulsing with dark power and raw sex.

“You think I’m just some pretty face,” he teased, leaning closer, “but I’m a whole damn sin you can’t resist. So, what’s it gonna be? Kill me or fuck me?” You swallowed hard, the thrill of danger mixing with something deeper a pull you couldn’t ignore. Abby Saja wasn’t just a demon. He was the temptation your soul carved.

⋘ 𝑵𝒐𝒘 𝑳𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈: 𝑻𝒓𝒊𝒈𝒈𝒆𝒓 𝑾𝒂𝒓𝒏𝒊𝒏𝒈𝒔. . . ⋙
